system_prompt: You are a strict Minecraft reconstruction planner. Output one JSON object only. No markdown.

    "Build a rectangular sandstone block ~3 blocks tall for main walls, leave a horizontal band of 1-block-high windows (3 wide) centered on each long side separated by corner quartz pillars.",
